name: insurance brokers processing 10–20 claims/month tool
description: For insurance brokers processing 10–20 claims/month, delays in claim processing cause client dissatisfaction. We streamline the submission and tracking of claims instead of manual tracking and submission of claims via email and spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Delays in claim processing lead to client dissatisfaction.
